---
applyTo: "**"
excludeAgent: "cloud-agent"
---

1. Skip the PR overview comment if possible
2. If you found meaningful changes to make go ahead and make them and push to the PR
3. when you're adding comments that are not ready to be worked on and require human attention add a "take-a-look" label to the PR
4. when reviewing PRs to the `release` branch focun on flagging breaking changes in the broader context as PR to the `release` branch as normally bigger
